items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) provides additional benefits for muscle strength compared to conventional low-load (LLE) or high-load exercise (HLE) in individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析表明，在肌肉骨骼康复中，低负荷伴血流限制（LLE-BFR）训练在增加肌肉力量方面，与常规低负荷（LLE）或高负荷（HLE）训练相比，显示出额外的益处。对于临床实践，这意味着在特定患者群体中，可以考虑将 LLE-BFR 作为一种有效的增强力量的方法，尤其是在低负荷训练无法达到预期效果时。
items.titleZh: 血流限制运动与常规运动在肌肉骨骼康复中的额外益处：系统综述与荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验（RCTs）进行的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与常规低负荷（LLE）或高负荷（HLE）运动相比，血流限制低负荷运动（LLE-BFR）在肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌肉力量方面具有额外益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis suggests that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits for muscle strength compared to conventional low-load (LLE) or high-load (HLE) exercise in musculoskeletal rehabilitation. Clinicians can consider LLE-BFR as an effective method to enhance strength in specific patient populations, particularly when low-load training alone is insufficient.
items.limitation: The review's conclusions are based on available RCTs, and the optimal parameters and specific patient subgroups for LLE-BFR may require further investigation.
items.limitationEn: The review's conclusions are based on available RCTs, and the optimal parameters and specific patient subgroups for LLE-BFR may require further investigation.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A prospective RCT in Switzerland evaluated diagnostic and treatment agreement between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for musculoskeletal conditions in the emergency department, assessing the feasibility of advanced physiotherapy practice roles.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性随机对照研究评估了瑞士急诊科物理治疗师（APP）在诊断和治疗肌肉骨骼疾病方面与住院医师和资深医师的一致性。研究结果将为物理治疗师在高级实践角色中的应用提供重要依据，尤其是在处理非紧急肌肉骨骼病症方面，可能优化患者流程和资源分配。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍的一线诊断与治疗一致性：前瞻性随机对照研究
items.titleEn: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summaryZh: 一项在瑞士进行的随机对照试验评估了物理治疗师与住院医师在急诊科肌肉骨骼病症诊断和治疗方面与资深医师的一致性，旨在为高级物理治疗实践角色提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective randomized controlled study evaluates the diagnostic and treatment agreement of physiotherapists in advanced practice roles (APP) compared to resident and senior physicians in a Swiss emergency department for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. The findings will be crucial for establishing the utility of APP roles in managing non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions, potentially optimizing patient flow and resource allocation.
items.limitation: The study was conducted in a single center, and the generalizability of findings to other healthcare settings may be limited. The reference standard was senior physicians, and future studies could compare directly against a wider range of specialists.
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single center, and the generalizability of findings to other healthcare settings may be limited. The reference standard was senior physicians, and future studies could compare directly against a wider range of specialists.

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A 2-year follow-up RCT found that an accelerated rehabilitation (AR) protocol for proximal hamstring tendon repair was non-inferior to a conservative (CR) protocol in restoring strength and functional symmetry, with similar complication rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项 2 年随访的随机对照试验（RCT）比较了近端腘绳肌肌腱修复术后保守（CR）与加速（AR）康复方案。研究发现，AR 方案在恢复力量和功能对称性方面，与 CR 方案相比，在 2 年时表现出相当的临床结果，且并发症和再损伤的发生率相似。对于运动员康复，这提供了高级别证据，支持在适当患者中采用更快的康复进程。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌肌腱修复术后康复方案（长期 vs 加速）的两年随访结果：PHARRLAP 研究
items.titleEn: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，近端腘绳肌肌腱修复术后的加速康复（AR）方案在恢复力量和功能对称性方面，与保守康复（CR）方案相比，在两年时表现相当，且并发症发生率相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 2-year follow-up RCT comparing conservative (CR) versus accelerated (AR) rehabilitation pathways after proximal hamstring tendon repair found AR to be non-inferior to CR in restoring strength and functional symmetry at 2 years, with similar rates of complications and reinjury. This provides high-level evidence supporting a faster rehabilitation progression in appropriate athletes.
items.limitation: The study involved patients undergoing repair for acute tendon avulsions involving at least two tendons; findings may not generalize to all proximal hamstring injuries or repair types.
items.limitationEn: The study involved patients undergoing repair for acute tendon avulsions involving at least two tendons; findings may not generalize to all proximal hamstring injuries or repair types.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy practice, research, and quality assessment, covering functioning and other domains.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究致力于为儿科物理治疗开发一套核心的患者报告结局（PROs）和测量（PROMs）集。通过多方（青少年、家长、治疗师）参与和专家评估，选定了 9 项 PROs，涵盖功能（身体功能等）领域。这有助于规范儿科 PT 实践中的结局评估，提升研究和质量评估的一致性。
items.titleZh: 制定儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集
items.titleEn: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summaryZh: 一项研究为儿科物理治疗制定了一套核心的患者报告结局（PROs）和测量（PROMs），共包含 9 项，涵盖功能等领域，以规范日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy. Through multi-stakeholder input and expert review, nine PROs were selected, covering domains like functioning. This initiative will help standardize outcome assessment in pediatric PT practice, enhancing consistency in research and quality evaluation.
items.limitation: The selection process involved surveys and expert panels, which may introduce biases. The applicability and validation of the selected PROMs across diverse pediatric populations require further study.
items.limitationEn: The selection process involved surveys and expert panels, which may introduce biases. The applicability and validation of the selected PROMs across diverse pediatric populations require further study.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: A critical appraisal indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for improving exercise capacity in COPD patients and may be superior for improving health status.
items.curatedReason: 这项批判性评估指出，基于移动设备的肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者运动能力方面，效果与中心化肺康复相当，但在改善健康状态方面可能更优。对于心肺康复从业者，这提供了支持利用远程医疗进行 COPD 肺康复的证据，尤其是在健康状态改善方面。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估：基于移动设备的肺康复与中心化肺康复在慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者中的效果
items.titleEn: [Editorial] Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summaryZh: 一项批判性评估指出，基于移动设备的肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者运动能力方面与中心化肺康复相当，但在改善健康状态方面可能更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This critical appraisal suggests that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is comparable to center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for improving exercise capacity in COPD patients, and potentially superior for improving health status. For cardiopulmonary rehabilitation professionals, this provides evidence supporting the use of telehealth for COPD pulmonary rehabilitation, particularly in enhancing health status.
items.limitation: This is a synopsis of a larger study and may not include all details of the original research.
items.limitationEn: This is a synopsis of a larger study and may not include all details of the original research.

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that a targeted strengthening program (STRENGTH) led by physiotherapists was superior to a standardized stretching program (STRETCH) for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) regarding hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived global change at 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项评估了物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）治疗的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）组在 6 个月时，其髋部相关生活质量（QOL）和患者感知变化总评分（GROC）均优于标准化牵伸（STRETCH）组。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在 FAI 治疗中优先采用强化训练方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗效果：一项评估者设盲、有限披露的随机对照试验（PhysioFIRST 研究）
items.titleEn: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，物理治疗师主导的目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）方案，在 6 个月时，相比标准化牵伸（STRETCH）方案，在股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的髋部相关生活质量和患者感知变化方面更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluating physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) found that the targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) group showed superior hip-related quality of life (QOL) and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change (GROC) at 6 months compared to the standardized stretching (STRETCH) group. This provides strong evidence for PTs to prioritize strengthening protocols in FAI management.
items.limitation: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.
items.limitationEn: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis identified the most effective physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, suggesting a combination of manual therapy, exercise, and education as optimal.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）旨在比较不同物理治疗干预措施对成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）的疗效。结果确定了最有效的干预措施组合（例如，结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育），为 PT 提供了优化肩袖肌腱病治疗方案的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较有效性：系统综述与网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）确定了成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）最有效的物理治疗干预组合，建议结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and network meta-analysis (NMA) compares the efficacy of different physical therapy interventions for adult rotator cuff tendinopathy (RC tendinopathy). It identifies the most effective combination of interventions (e.g., combining manual therapy, exercise, and education), providing strong evidence for PTs to optimize treatment protocols for RC tendinopathy.
items.limitation: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.
items.limitationEn: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT found that a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device improved flexor spasticity and hand function in chronic stroke patients, suggesting it as a potential adjunct therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步的随机对照试验（RCT）表明，一种动态腕手牵伸装置可有效改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛，并可能改善手部功能。对于康复从业者而言，这提示了一种可能比传统牵伸更易于患者居家依从的辅助干预手段，值得进一步大型研究验证。
items.titleZh: 使用动态腕手牵伸设备改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：初步随机对照试验
items.titleEn: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项初步随机对照试验显示，一种动态腕手牵伸设备可改善慢性卒中患者的屈肌痉挛，并可能改善手部功能，有望成为一种辅助治疗手段。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device can effectively improve flexor spasticity and potentially hand function in patients with chronic stroke. This points towards a potential adjunct intervention that may improve home adherence compared to conventional stretching, warranting further investigation in larger trials.
items.limitation: This is a pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limiting the generalizability of its findings and the ability to draw definitive conclusions about long-term efficacy.
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limiting the generalizability of its findings and the ability to draw definitive conclusions about long-term efficacy.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A meta-analysis found repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) to be effective for improving motor function in Parkinson's disease patients, short-term and long-term, with factors like stimulation site and frequency influencing outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病（PD）患者运动功能的影响，并探讨了影响治疗效果的因素。结果显示 rTMS 短期和长期均能改善运动功能，同时提示了优化治疗参数（如刺激位点、频率等）的重要性。对于神经康复从业者，这是基于证据的治疗选择，可考虑作为 PD 患者运动功能改善的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病患者运动功能的疗效及调节因素：荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃分析表明，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）可短期和长期改善帕金森病（PD）患者的运动功能，且刺激位点、频率等因素会影响治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis evaluates the effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease (PD) patients and explores influencing factors. It indicates that rTMS can improve motor function both short-term and long-term, highlighting the importance of optimizing treatment parameters. This provides an evidence-based therapeutic option for neurorehabilitation professionals to consider as an adjunct for improving motor function in PD patients.
items.limitation: The included studies varied in stimulation site, coil type, frequency, and treatment duration, leading to heterogeneity that may affect the pooled results.
items.limitationEn: The included studies varied in stimulation site, coil type, frequency, and treatment duration, leading to heterogeneity that may affect the pooled results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review identified the need for weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injuries due to high recurrence rates and analyzed the methodological quality of existing literature, highlighting a need for higher-quality research.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述旨在为腘绳肌损伤的重返运动制定加权标准，并对现有研究的方法学质量进行了分析。鉴于腘绳肌损伤的高复发率，明确的重返运动标准对于减少复发、降低经济成本至关重要。该研究为制定更严谨的评估和决策流程提供了参考。
items.titleZh: 制定腘绳肌损伤重返运动的加权标准：系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.titleEn: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在为腘绳肌损伤的重返运动制定加权标准，并分析了现有研究的方法学质量，强调了提高研究质量以制定可靠标准的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review aims to establish weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injuries and analyzes the methodological quality of existing research. Given the high recurrence rate of hamstring injuries, clear return-to-play criteria are crucial for reducing relapses and economic costs. This study provides a reference for developing more rigorous assessment and decision-making processes.
items.limitation: The review identified significant heterogeneity in the methodological quality of included studies, suggesting a need for higher-quality research to establish robust return-to-play criteria.
items.limitationEn: The review identified significant heterogeneity in the methodological quality of included studies, suggesting a need for higher-quality research to establish robust return-to-play criteria.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study found that a 12-week exergaming intervention improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 这项实用性准实验研究评估了 12 周的“电子游戏”（exergaming）干预对机构化老年衰弱症患者的身体、心理和社会结局的影响。研究假设游戏化干预能带来多方面的改善。对于老年康复从业者，这提供了关于如何利用游戏化技术改善机构化老年人生活质量的实用见解。
items.titleZh: 电子游戏对机构化衰弱老年人多方面益处：身体、心理与社会结局
items.titleEn: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验研究发现，为期 12 周的电子游戏（exergaming）干预改善了机构化衰弱老年人的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study evaluated the impact of a 12-week exergaming intervention on physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. The study hypothesized multifaceted improvements from gamified interventions. For geriatric rehabilitation professionals, this offers practical insights into leveraging exergaming to enhance the quality of life for institutionalized elderly.
items.limitation: The study involved a specific exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) and may not be generalizable to all exergaming platforms or populations.
items.limitationEn: The study involved a specific exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) and may not be generalizable to all exergaming platforms or populations.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of RCTs found that combined exercise training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响。结果显示，联合训练（结合有氧和抗阻训练）在降低 24 小时收缩压和舒张压方面最有效。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在高血压管理中推荐联合运动方案。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响：随机对照试验网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析发现，联合运动训练（有氧和抗阻）在高血压成人中对降低 24 小时动态血压最有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis of RCTs compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. The findings indicate that combined training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour systolic and diastolic blood pressure. This provides strong evidence for PTs to recommend combined exercise programs in hypertension management.
items.limitation: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.
items.limitationEn: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study examined the associations of functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with physical activity levels in 85 women with obesity.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了肥胖女性中，功能容量、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与整体体力活动水平的关联。虽然不能确定因果关系，但研究结果提示，在设计干预措施时，应同时考虑这几个因素，以提高女性的体力活动参与度。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝盖症状与功能容量
items.titleEn: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究，考察了功能容量、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与整体体力活动水平之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the associations between functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with overall physical activity levels in women with obesity. While causality cannot be determined, the findings suggest that interventions aiming to increase physical activity should simultaneously address these factors.
items.limitation: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between the assessed factors and physical activity levels in women with obesity.
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between the assessed factors and physical activity levels in women with obesity.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis of UK Biobank data suggests that light-intensity physical activity (LPA) is associated with a reduced risk of all-cause mortality, even at low levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析，探讨了轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险之间在不同中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平下的剂量-反应关系。结果提示，即使在低 MVPA 水平下，增加 LPA 也能带来显著的死亡率降低。这为 PT 强调低强度活动（如日常活动、散步）的健康益处提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 轻度体力活动与全因死亡风险之间的剂量-反应关系：因果推断分析
items.titleEn: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析表明，轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险降低相关，即使在中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平较低时也是如此。
items.curatedReasonEn: This causal inference analysis using UK Biobank data explores the dose-response relationship between light-intensity physical activity (LPA) and all-cause mortality risk across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA). It suggests that increasing LPA can significantly reduce mortality risk, even at lower MVPA levels. This provides strong evidence for PTs to emphasize the health benefits of low-intensity activities.
items.limitation: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: An RCT found that perioperative respiratory muscle training improved respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）评估了围手术期呼吸肌训练对接受心脏手术的老年患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。结果表明，这种训练可能改善患者的肺部恢复和整体预后。对于进行心肺康复的 PT 来说，这是一项重要的临床证据。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.titleEn: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）发现，围手术期呼吸肌训练可改善老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly cardiac surgery patients. Findings suggest this training may improve pulmonary recovery and overall prognosis. This provides important clinical evidence for PTs involved in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article offers strategies for managing difficult conversations in rehabilitation, emphasizing client-centered communication to foster the client-clinician relationship.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章提供了在康复环境中管理困难对话的策略，强调了以客户为中心的沟通方法。对于 PT 来说，学习和应用这些沟通技巧至关重要，尤其是在处理复杂情况和维护患者-治疗师关系时。
items.titleZh: 促进康复中的以客户为中心的沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.titleEn: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章提供了在康复环境中管理困难对话的策略，强调了以客户为中心的沟通方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article provides strategies for managing difficult conversations in rehabilitation settings, emphasizing client-centered communication approaches. For PTs, learning and applying these communication skills is crucial, especially when navigating complex situations and maintaining the client-therapist relationship.
items.limitation: This is a perspective or guide on communication strategies, not a research study presenting empirical data or evidence of effectiveness.
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective or guide on communication strategies, not a research study presenting empirical data or evidence of effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: A small retrospective cohort study suggests that an intensive community-based virtual reality (VR) therapy may be effective in reducing upper extremity impairment after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究探讨了一种社区为基础的高强度、高剂量（HDHI）虚拟现实（VR）疗法（NG-NAT）在卒中后上肢损伤减少方面的效果。研究结果表明，这种疗法可能是一种可行的、有效的社区康复选择。对于卒中康复的 PT，这提供了关于利用 VR 技术在社区环境中改善上肢功能的新见解。
items.titleZh: 针对卒中后上肢损伤的强化社区化下一代神经动画疗法的疗效：一项小型回顾性队列研究
items.titleEn: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summaryZh: 一项小型回顾性队列研究表明，一种强化社区化虚拟现实（VR）疗法可能有效减少卒中后的上肢损伤。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study explored the effect of a community-based high-dose, high-intensity (HDHI) virtual reality (VR) therapy (NG-NAT) in reducing upper extremity impairment after stroke. Findings suggest this therapy may be a viable and effective community-based rehabilitation option. For PTs involved in stroke rehabilitation, this offers new insights into leveraging VR technology for improving upper extremity function in community settings.
items.limitation: This is a small retrospective cohort study, limiting the ability to draw definitive conclusions about efficacy and generalizability. The lack of a control group makes it difficult to isolate the effect of the intervention.
items.limitationEn: This is a small retrospective cohort study, limiting the ability to draw definitive conclusions about efficacy and generalizability. The lack of a control group makes it difficult to isolate the effect of the intervention.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective piece emphasizes the importance of identifying and managing early symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) as a critical 'opportunity window' to slow disease progression, calling for increased clinical and research attention.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章强调了早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的识别和管理的重要性，指出这是减缓疾病进程的“机会窗口”。研究呼吁增加对这一领域的关注，并为临床医生和患者提供识别和有效治疗的指导。对于 PT 来说，这意味着在更年轻的患者群体中，需要更早地识别和干预髋关节 OA。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个机会窗口
items.titleEn: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summaryZh: 这篇观点文章强调了识别和管理早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的重要性，称其为减缓疾病进展的“机会窗口”，并呼吁增加对该领域的关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective highlights the importance of identifying and managing early symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA), labeling it an 'opportunity window' to slow disease progression. It calls for increased attention to this area and guidance for clinicians and patients on recognition and effective treatment. For PTs, this signifies the need for earlier identification and intervention for hip OA in younger patient populations.
items.limitation: This is a perspective piece, not a research study, and does not present new empirical data. Its clinical recommendations are based on current understanding and expert opinion.
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece, not a research study, and does not present new empirical data. Its clinical recommendations are based on current understanding and expert opinion.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summary: A cross-sectional study surveyed Cameroonian football clubs on cardiovascular screening and emergency response planning to help prevent sudden cardiac death.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查了喀麦隆足球俱乐部心血管筛查策略和应急响应计划的横断面研究，是在 Marc-Vivien Foe 悲剧性死亡后进行的。研究旨在预防足球运动员的猝死。对于在运动医学领域工作的 PT 来说，这项研究提供了关于特定地区（喀麦隆）预防措施的实践信息。
items.titleZh: 预防喀麦隆足球运动员猝死：Marc-Vivien Foe 悲剧性死亡 22 年后的随访
items.titleEn: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summaryZh: 一项针对喀麦隆足球俱乐部的横断面调查，评估了心血管筛查策略和应急响应计划，旨在预防运动员猝死。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study investigating cardiovascular screening strategies and emergency response planning in Cameroonian football clubs, conducted after the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe, aims to prevent sudden cardiac death in athletes. For PTs working in sports medicine, this study provides practical information on preventative measures in a specific region (Cameroon).
items.limitation: This is a cross-sectional study describing current practices and preparedness in Cameroon, not an intervention study testing the effectiveness of specific screening or response protocols.
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study describing current practices and preparedness in Cameroon, not an intervention study testing the effectiveness of specific screening or response protocols.

items.title: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summary: A prospective study on US Army trainees found that biomarkers of systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis were associated with musculoskeletal injuries (MSKI) and persisted throughout training.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究评估了美国陆军新兵在基础战斗训练（BCT）期间，全身炎症和氧化应激生物标志物是否与肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）相关，并追踪了这些标志物的纵向变化。结果表明，系统性炎症和氧化应激可能在损伤发生前就已存在并持续存在。这提示 PT 在评估和管理陆军新兵 MSKI 时，可能需要考虑这些生理指标。
items.titleZh: 美国陆军新兵在肌肉骨骼损伤前后出现炎症和氧化还原稳态改变
items.titleEn: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summaryZh: 一项针对美国陆军新兵的前瞻性研究发现，系统性炎症和氧化还原稳态的生物标志物与肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）相关，并在训练期间持续存在。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study assessed whether systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis biomarkers associate with musculoskeletal injury (MSKI) during US Army Basic Combat Training (BCT) and characterized longitudinal changes. Findings suggest systemic inflammation and oxidative stress may precede and persist following injury. This suggests PTs may need to consider these physiological markers when assessing and managing MSKI in Army trainees.
items.limitation: This is an observational study, so it can only establish associations, not causality. The study population was limited to US Army trainees.
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, so it can only establish associations, not causality. The study population was limited to US Army trainees.

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries to inform healthy aging initiatives.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家/地区的个体内在能力（intrinsic capacity）的变化和时间趋势，以促进健康老龄化。研究结果为 PT 了解全球老年人群的健康状况提供了背景信息，并可能影响未来针对特定人群的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自 32 个国家/地区的证据
items.titleEn: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家/地区的内在能力（intrinsic capacity）的变化和时间趋势，以促进健康老龄化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries to promote healthy aging. The findings provide context for PTs regarding the health status of global older populations and may inform future intervention strategies tailored to specific demographics.
items.limitation: The study relies on aggregated data and may not capture individual-level variations or specific country contexts accurately. The definition and measurement of 'intrinsic capacity' can also vary.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on aggregated data and may not capture individual-level variations or specific country contexts accurately. The definition and measurement of 'intrinsic capacity' can also vary.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of the 'All of Us' research program examined sociodemographic determinants of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 这项针对“All of Us”研究项目中脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的横断面分析，旨在比较食物不安全（FI）的患病率、其社会人口学决定因素以及与身体质量指数（BMI）的关联。这为 PT 了解 SCI 患者的社会经济影响及其对健康结局的潜在作用提供了信息。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤个体食物不安全性的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联：来自“All of Us”研究项目的横断面分析
items.titleEn: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summaryZh: 一项针对脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的横断面分析，调查了食物不安全（FI）的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional analysis from the 'All of Us' research program, focusing on individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI), aims to compare the prevalence of food insecurity (FI), identify its correlates, and examine its association with body mass index (BMI). This informs PTs about the socioeconomic impacts on SCI patients and their potential role in health outcomes.
items.limitation: This is a cross-sectional analysis, which cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI or other factors. The study population is specific to participants in the 'All of Us' research program.
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional analysis, which cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI or other factors. The study population is specific to participants in the 'All of Us' research program.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This study investigated correlates of loneliness in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI), highlighting potential psychosocial challenges.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤（SCI）患者孤独感的相关因素。鉴于孤独感是重要的公共卫生问题，且可能因残疾而加剧，这项研究为 PT 提供了关于如何识别和潜在干预 SCI 患者心理健康状况的背景信息。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素
items.titleEn: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤（SCI）患者孤独感的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores correlates of loneliness in persons with spinal cord injury (SCI). Given that loneliness is a significant public health issue and can be exacerbated by disability, this research provides PTs with background information on identifying and potentially addressing the psychological well-being of SCI patients.
items.limitation: This study identifies correlates of loneliness but does not investigate interventions to reduce it. The findings are specific to individuals with SCI.
items.limitationEn: This study identifies correlates of loneliness but does not investigate interventions to reduce it. The findings are specific to individuals with SCI.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summary: This editorial calls for increased attention to the mental health of esports athletes, given the field's growing recognition and the demands of high-performance competition.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论呼吁关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康，鉴于电子竞技日益增长的地位（如进入奥运会）。它强调了运动医学、公共卫生和电竞利益相关者需要严肃对待电竞选手心理健康问题。对于 PT，尤其是有志于运动康复的，这是对新兴领域关注点的一个提醒。
items.titleZh: 是时候关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康了
items.titleEn: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论呼吁关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康，因为该领域日益受到认可，并且竞技要求严苛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial calls for attention to the mental health of esports athletes, given the growing prominence of esports (e.g., inclusion in the Olympics). It emphasizes the need for sports medicine, public health, and esports stakeholders to take player mental health seriously. For PTs, especially those in sports rehabilitation, this serves as a reminder of emerging areas of concern.
items.limitation: This is an editorial calling for action and raising awareness, not a research study providing specific data or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial calling for action and raising awareness, not a research study providing specific data or interventions.

items.title: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summary: This article calls for action on period pain in female athletes, highlighting its prevalence, impact on performance, and the need for tailored management pathways due to existing evidence gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章发出了对女性运动员经期疼痛问题的行动呼吁，强调了其普遍性（影响 60% 的女性运动员）及其对运动表现的负面影响。研究指出当前证据存在空白，呼吁制定针对性的管理方案。这对于关注女性健康和运动表现的 PT 具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员的经期疼痛：行动呼吁——是时候填补证据空白并制定针对性管理方案了
items.titleEn: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章呼吁关注女性运动员的经期疼痛问题，强调其普遍性、对运动表现的影响以及因证据不足而需要制定针对性管理方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article issues a call to action regarding period pain in female athletes, highlighting its prevalence (affecting 60% of female athletes) and negative impact on sports performance. It points out evidence gaps and calls for tailored management pathways. This is significant for PTs focusing on women's health and sports performance.
items.limitation: This is a call to action and perspective piece highlighting an evidence gap, not a research study presenting findings or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is a call to action and perspective piece highlighting an evidence gap, not a research study presenting findings or interventions.

items.title: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summary: This editorial proposes 'paediatric powerpenia' as a research priority, emphasizing the importance of muscle power (force x velocity) in childhood for long-term musculoskeletal health and function.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出了“儿科肌力不足”（paediatric powerpenia）作为一个生命历程研究重点，强调肌肉力量（而非仅仅是力量）与功能的关系，并呼吁关注儿童期低肌肉力量这一可干预的风险因素。对于儿科 PT，这提示了关注儿童肌肉力量发展的重要性。
items.titleZh: 播下力量的种子：儿科肌力不足作为生命历程研究重点
items.titleEn: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了“儿科肌力不足”（paediatric powerpenia）作为一个生命历程研究重点，强调儿童期肌肉力量发展的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes 'paediatric powerpenia' as a lifecourse research priority, highlighting the relationship between muscle power (not just strength) and function, and advocating for attention to low muscle power in childhood as a modifiable risk factor. For pediatric PTs, this emphasizes the importance of monitoring and addressing muscle power development in children.
items.limitation: This is an editorial, framing a research priority and concept rather than presenting empirical data or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial, framing a research priority and concept rather than presenting empirical data or interventions.

items.title: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD thesis explored patient experiences, optimized rehabilitation interventions, and opioid use following revision total hip replacement (THR), comparing targeted strengthening to standard care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 PhD 研究论文探讨了翻修全髋关节置换术（THR）后患者的康复体验、优化干预措施和阿片类药物使用情况。它研究了患者如何体验康复，比较了强化训练与标准社区康复的效果，并分析了阿片类药物的持续使用。这为 PT 在 THR 翻修后患者的康复管理提供了有价值的见解。
items.titleZh: 翻修全髋关节置换术后的康复与结局：患者体验、优化康复干预与阿片类药物使用（PhD 学术奖）
items.titleEn: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summaryZh: 一项 PhD 研究论文探讨了翻修全髋关节置换术（THR）后的患者康复体验、优化干预措施和阿片类药物使用情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research thesis investigated patient experiences and opioid use following revision total hip replacement (THR). It examined how patients experience rehabilitation, compared targeted strengthening to standard community rehabilitation, and analyzed persistent opioid use. This offers valuable insights for PTs managing patients post-revision THR.
items.limitation: This is a summary of a PhD thesis and may not contain the full methodological details or results of the individual studies within it.
items.limitationEn: This is a summary of a PhD thesis and may not contain the full methodological details or results of the individual studies within it.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRF) versus Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNF) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation from a U.S. healthcare payer perspective.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医保支付方视角看，卒中后急性期康复，入住IRF比SNF更具成本效益。这为IRF在政策和报销谈判中提供了强有力的经济学证据，你应该熟悉这些数据。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方视角评估急性卒中后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构 vs. 专业护理机构
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型从美国医保支付方视角，评估了卒中后急性期康复中，住院康复机构（IRF）与专业护理机构（SNF）的成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a U.S. healthcare payer perspective, post-acute stroke rehabilitation in Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) is more cost-effective than in Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs). This provides strong economic evidence for IRFs in policy and reimbursement discussions, and you should be familiar with this data.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型参数的准确性及假设的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study uses a decision analytic model, and its results depend on the accuracy of model parameters and the validity of assumptions.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summary: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine (SEM) framework to maintain fitness amidst global conflicts, confinement, and potential radiation exposure.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与体育医学（SEM）框架，以应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和辐射暴露等挑战对体能的影响。它借鉴了 COVID-19 期间的经验，并考虑了地缘政治危机下的锻炼维持问题。虽然具有前瞻性，但对 PT 的直接临床指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 战火下的体能：一个运动与体育医学框架，以在现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和可能的辐射暴露背景下维持体能
items.titleEn: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与体育医学（SEM）框架，旨在应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和可能的辐射暴露对体能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine (SEM) framework to address the impact of modern global conflicts, enforced confinement, and potential radiation exposure on fitness. It draws on experiences from the COVID-19 pandemic and considers fitness maintenance during geopolitical crises. While forward-looking, its direct clinical guidance for PTs is limited.
items.limitation: This is an editorial proposing a framework based on current global challenges, not a research study presenting empirical data or specific interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial proposing a framework based on current global challenges, not a research study presenting empirical data or specific interventions.

items.title: Supporting journal selection: an open-source academic journal verification tool for researchers in sports and exercise medicine
items.summary: This editorial introduces an open-source tool designed to help researchers in sports and exercise medicine verify and select appropriate academic journals for publication.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论介绍了支持期刊选择的一个开源学术期刊验证工具，旨在帮助运动与体育医学领域的研究者在日益拥挤的出版环境中找到合适的期刊。对 PT 研究者来说，这可能有助于论文发表的决策，但与临床实践关系不大。
items.titleZh: 支持期刊选择：一个面向运动与体育医学研究者的开源学术期刊验证工具
items.titleEn: Supporting journal selection: an open-source academic journal verification tool for researchers in sports and exercise medicine
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论介绍了一个开源工具，旨在帮助运动与体育医学领域的研究者验证和选择合适的学术期刊。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial introduces an open-source academic journal verification tool to support journal selection for researchers in sports and exercise medicine navigating a crowded publishing landscape. While potentially aiding PT researchers in publication decisions, it has limited relevance to clinical practice.
items.limitation: This is an editorial discussing a tool for journal selection, not a research study or clinical practice guide.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial discussing a tool for journal selection, not a research study or clinical practice guide.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: A benefit-harm trade-off study via an online survey involving 92 recreationally or competitively active individuals estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management on knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究量化了ACL重建术与非手术管理在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的“最小有益效应”。在与患者进行共享决策时，你可以引用这些量化数据，帮助患者理解不同干预方案的潜在效益与风险权衡。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗相比的最小有益效应：一项效益-危害权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对92名休闲或竞技运动参与者进行的在线效益-危害权衡研究，评估了ACL重建与非手术管理在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study quantifies the "smallest worthwhile effect" of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management on knee function and return to sport. Use these quantified data in shared decision-making to help patients understand the potential benefits and risks of different intervention options.
items.limitation: 本研究基于在线调查，数据可能存在回忆偏倚和选择偏倚，且评估的效应为患者主观认知，非客观生理指标。
items.limitationEn: This study is based on an online survey, and data may be subject to recall and selection bias; the effect assessed is patient-perceived, not objective physiological metrics.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: This review of 1,548 RCTs on post-stroke lower extremity rehabilitation found that low-to-middle-income countries (LMICs) more frequently use generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures relying on patient observation compared to high-income countries (HICs).
items.curatedReason: 本系统综述提示，中低收入国家（LMICs）和高收入国家（HICs）在卒中下肢康复试验中使用的结局测量指标存在差异。评估和解读跨国研究时，需留意所选OM对结果可比性的影响。
items.titleZh: 卒中下肢康复试验中结局测量指标使用模式的跨国差异：中低收入国家与高收入国家的比较
items.summaryZh: 这项对1548项卒中下肢康复RCT的综述发现，与高收入国家相比，中低收入国家更多使用依赖患者观察的通用性功能障碍和日常生活活动结局测量指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review suggests differences in outcome measure utilization in stroke lower extremity rehabilitation trials between low-to-middle-income countries (LMICs) and high-income countries (HICs). When evaluating and interpreting cross-national research, be mindful of how OM selection impacts result comparability.
items.limitation: 本综述未报告不同结局测量指标在测量敏感性或临床相关性方面的具体差异，可能无法完全解释其对康复效果评估的潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: This review did not report specific differences in measurement sensitivity or clinical relevance of various outcome measures, which may limit its ability to fully explain their potential impact on rehabilitation outcome assessment.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: A prospective observational study of 92 AUVP patients found significant changes in anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) after an 8-week visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) program, suggesting AcS as a potential marker for central compensation.
items.curatedReason: 本观察研究表明，急性单侧前庭病变（AUVP）患者在8周视动-前庭物理治疗（VVPT）后，抗补偿性扫视（AcS）显著改善，这提示AcS可能是前庭康复中央代偿的有效生物标志物。在临床实践中，可考虑将SHIMP评估纳入VVPT效果监测。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病变患者视动-前庭物理治疗后抗补偿性扫视的变化：一项前瞻性观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对92名急性单侧前庭病变患者的前瞻性观察性研究发现，经过8周视动-前庭物理治疗后，抗补偿性扫视（AcS）显著改善，提示AcS可作为中央代偿的潜在标志物。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study indicates significant improvement in anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) after 8 weeks of visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy (AUVP), suggesting AcS could be a useful biomarker for central compensation in vestibular rehabilitation. Consider incorporating SHIMP assessment into VVPT effectiveness monitoring in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法排除混杂因素对VVPT效果的影响，且未设置对照组。
items.limitationEn: This observational study cannot rule out confounding factors influencing VVPT effectiveness and lacks a control group.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: A multi-method study integrating a narrative review, a two-round Delphi process with 15 experts, and multi-criteria decision-making identified and quantitatively prioritized fall-prevention strategies for people with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项综合研究通过专家共识和多准则决策，为帕金森病跌倒预防策略提供了量化优先级。它肯定了多学科干预和运动策略的核心地位。在制定康复计划时，应优先考虑报告中排名靠前的策略。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先排序：一项多方法评估
items.summaryZh: 一项结合叙述性综述、15位专家两轮德尔菲共识和多准则决策的多方法研究，识别并量化了帕金森病患者跌倒预防策略的优先级。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comprehensive study provides quantitatively prioritized fall prevention strategies for Parkinson's disease through expert consensus and multi-criteria decision-making. It affirms the central role of multidisciplinary interventions and exercise strategies. Prioritize the top-ranked strategies from the report when developing rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 专家共识可能存在主观性偏差，且结果未经过临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: Expert consensus may introduce subjective bias, and the results have not been validated in clinical trials.

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study examined 4-week inpatient rehabilitation outcomes in post-stroke hemiplegia patients, finding associations between neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with poorer functional status, quality of life, and depressive symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究提示，卒中后的神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化可能与康复预后不良相关。在康复评估中，除了关注运动功能，也应筛查和管理疼痛的心理社会维度，这可能影响患者依从性和最终功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与卒中患者康复预后的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究考察了卒中后偏瘫患者4周住院康复预后，发现神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与较差的功能状态、生活质量和抑郁症状相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study suggests that neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing after stroke may be associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes. In rehabilitation assessments, in addition to motor function, screen for and manage the psychosocial dimensions of pain, as this can impact patient adherence and ultimate functional recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心前瞻性观察研究，样本量较小，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center prospective observational study with a small sample size, potentially subject to selection bias and confounding factors, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (1,372 participants) found that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]; p < .01) in knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析提供了短波透热疗法（SWD）治疗膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）的有力证据，显示其能显著改善疼痛（平均改善-2.13点，95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]）和步行能力（平均改善-0.72点，95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]）。在KOA的物理治疗方案中，可以更肯定地考虑使用SWD。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝关节骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含17项试验（1372名参与者）的系统综述与荟萃分析发现，短波透热疗法（SWD）能显著改善膝关节骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均-2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和步行能力（平均-0.72；95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis provides strong evidence for shortwave diathermy (SWD) in treating knee osteoarthritis (KOA), showing significant improvements in pain (mean -2.13, 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.72, 95% CI [-1.08, -0.37]). You can more confidently consider using SWD in KOA physical therapy protocols.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性高（I² ≥ 75%），可能影响结果的稳定性与解释。
items.limitationEn: The included studies exhibit high heterogeneity (I² ≥ 75%), which may affect the stability and interpretation of the results.

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT with 24 ACLR male athletes who had returned to sport showed that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors compared to control.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后运动员的视觉扰动训练改善了非预期切向动作中的下肢生物力学和运动错误，提示在重返运动训练中，除了传统的肌肉力量和本体感觉训练，也应纳入认知和视觉整合任务，以更全面地恢复神经肌肉控制，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 视觉扰动训练对ACL重建男性运动员非预期切向动作下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对24名已重返运动的ACL重建男性运动员的随机对照试验显示，8周的视觉扰动训练显著改善了非预期切向动作的下肢生物力学并减少了错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual perturbation training improved lower-limb biomechanics and movement errors during unanticipated cutting in ACLR athletes. This suggests that in return-to-sport training, integrate cognitive and visual tasks alongside traditional strength and proprioception exercises for more comprehensive neuromuscular control restoration and reduced reinjury risk.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小，仅限于男性运动员，可能无法完全推广到所有ACL重建人群，且长期效果尚未明确。
items.limitationEn: This study had a small sample size and was limited to male athletes, so the results may not be fully generalizable to all ACLR populations, and long-term effects are not yet clear.

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial explored a digital physiotherapy supported self-management program (TRAK MSK) for adults with self-reported activity-related joint pain, comparing it with usual NHS physiotherapy care over 16 weeks.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 数字自我管理项目在可行性研究中展现了潜力，但目前只是初步证据。在其大型 RCT 结果公布前，应将其视为辅助工具，而不是替代传统物理治疗。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗辅助自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 这项为期16周的两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验，对比了针对报告关节疼痛的成年人的数字物理治疗辅助自我管理项目（TRAK MSK）与常规NHS物理治疗的异同。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK digital self-management program shows potential in this feasibility study, but it's preliminary evidence. Until results from a definitive RCT are available, consider it an adjunct rather than a replacement for traditional physiotherapy.
items.limitation: 本研究为可行性试验，样本量相对较小，结果主要用于评估大规模RCT的可行性而非干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This was a feasibility trial with a relatively small sample size, primarily evaluating the feasibility of a larger RCT rather than the intervention's effectiveness.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: An online survey among Swedish physiotherapists found major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement surgery due to limited supporting evidence, potentially impacting patient outcomes and fear of movement.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示瑞典物理治疗师在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议上存在显著差异。在缺乏统一循证指南的情况下，应注意自身建议的一致性和患者教育的充分性，避免给患者造成困惑。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：瑞典物理治疗师调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的在线调查发现，由于循证依据有限，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在显著差异，这可能影响患者预后和运动恐惧。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals significant discrepancies in long-term activity restriction recommendations after knee replacement among Swedish physiotherapists. In the absence of unified evidence-based guidelines, ensure your recommendations are consistent and patient education is thorough to avoid confusion.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅能揭示相关性，无法确定因果关系，且结果基于瑞典特定人群。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey can only show associations, not causation, and its findings are specific to the Swedish population.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: A systematic review using COSMIN methodology evaluated the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke, finding high certainty evidence for its structural validity, internal consistency, and reliability.
items.curatedReason: 中风患者躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）的测量属性现在有高确定性证据支持其有效性和可靠性。你可以放心在临床中使用 TIS 作为中风患者躯干康复评估的核心工具，特别是其结构效度、内部一致性和可靠性。
items.titleZh: 躯干功能障碍量表在中风后应用的心测量学特性：一项采用 COSMIN 方法的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项采用 COSMIN 方法的系统综述评估了躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）在中风患者中的心理测量学特性，发现其结构效度、内部一致性和可靠性具有高确定性证据支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-certainty evidence now supports the validity and reliability of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) for stroke patients. You can confidently use TIS as a core assessment tool in stroke trunk rehabilitation, especially regarding its structural validity, internal consistency, and reliability.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告 TIS 在所有测量属性上证据的确定性等级，可能存在某些属性的证据强度较低。
items.limitationEn: The study does not explicitly report the certainty of evidence for all measurement properties of TIS, suggesting that some properties might have lower evidence strength.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: Spine. Exploratory retrospective cohort. To determine the impact of sarcopenia on adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). Sarcopenia has been show
items.curatedReason: 在颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌肉减少症（Sarcopenia）是 3 年内发生邻近节段退变的风险因素。这意味着你应在术前筛查患者的肌肉减少症情况，并考虑将其纳入术后康复管理，以降低 ASD 风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). This implies you should screen for sarcopenia preoperatively and consider it in postoperative rehabilitation management to mitigate ASD risk.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，无法确定肌肉减少症与 ASD 的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which is subject to selection bias and confounding factors, and cannot establish a causal relationship between sarcopenia and ASD.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found no significant difference in KOOS-PS and pain at 1 year post-primary total knee arthroplasty between those who received preoperative physiotherapy and those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 术前物理治疗与膝关节置换术后患者报告结局（PROMs）间的长期关联仍不明确。虽然短期可能有益，但长期来看，其对 1 年后 KOOS-PS 和疼痛的额外价值证据不足。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究发现，在初次全膝关节置换术后 1 年，接受术前物理治疗的患者与未接受者在 KOOS-PS 和疼痛方面没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: The long-term association between preoperative physiotherapy and postoperative patient-reported outcomes (PROMs) after total knee arthroplasty remains unclear. While there may be short-term benefits, evidence for additional value on KOOS-PS and pain at 1 year post-op is insufficient.
items.limitation: 这是一项注册研究，可能存在混杂因素，并且无法排除选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a registry-based cohort study, which may have confounding factors and selection bias cannot be ruled out.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 60 participants found that therapeutic massage, conventional physiotherapy, and combined treatment all improved pain, pressure pain threshold, and functional disability in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome over the short term.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩与常规物理治疗的短期效果相似，联合治疗可能带来额外益处。在考虑干预方案时，可以把按摩纳入考虑，但还需要更多证据支持其长期效果和作为独立疗法的地位。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗在肌筋膜疼痛综合征中的短期效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 60 例慢性斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，治疗性按摩、常规物理治疗以及联合治疗在短期内均能改善疼痛、压痛阈和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage shows similar short-term effects to conventional physiotherapy, with potential added benefits from combined treatment. Consider incorporating massage into intervention plans, but further evidence is needed for its long-term efficacy and standalone role.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（n=60），且只关注了短期效果，对长期疗效的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (n=60) and focuses only on short-term effects, limiting generalizability to long-term efficacy.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study of 20 Australian physiotherapists found that the WalkBack program for low back pain prevention is acceptable, but its implementation in routine practice relies on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目为预防复发性腰痛提供了基于步行的干预方案，但其在临床实践中的推广仍面临挑战。你应认识到，实施预防性项目需要充足的培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行与教育）腰痛预防项目获得物理治疗师认可，但其优化实施依赖培训、灵活性和系统性支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 名澳大利亚物理治疗师的定性研究发现，WalkBack 腰痛预防项目是可接受的，但其在常规实践中的实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program offers a walking-based intervention for recurrent low back pain prevention, but its implementation in clinical practice still faces challenges. You should recognize that implementing preventive programs requires adequate training, flexibility, and system-level support.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（n=20），且受访者均在澳大利亚执业，结果可能不具备普适性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (n=20), and all interviewed physiotherapists practice in Australia, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 1,350 patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain found that socio-cultural factors were associated with and predicted pain intensity, disability, and health-related quality of life at baseline, 3, 6, and 12 months.
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的结局有长期预测作用。在评估和制定治疗方案时，你应该考虑这些因素，因为它们可能影响疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的长期轨迹。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化预测因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 1,350 名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者进行的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素与基线、3、6 和 12 个月时的疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量相关并有预测作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Socio-cultural factors have long-term predictive effects on outcomes for patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain. You should consider these factors in assessment and treatment planning, as they may influence the long-term trajectory of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life.
items.limitation: 观察研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在未测量混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, which cannot establish causality and may have unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 11 patients and 10 physiotherapists in Norwegian primary healthcare with a CDSS (SupportPrim PT) for musculoskeletal disorders, highlighting its influence on decision-making processes.
items.curatedReason: 临床决策支持系统（CDSS）有望改善肌肉骨骼疾病的物理治疗。这项研究表明，你需要关注 CDSS 如何在诊疗过程中影响物理治疗师和患者的决策权威性，以确保技术赋能而非取代临床判断。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了 11 名患者和 10 名物理治疗师在挪威初级医疗保健中使用肌肉骨骼疾病临床决策支持系统（SupportPrim PT）的经验，强调了其对决策过程的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Clinical decision support systems (CDSS) hold promise for improving physiotherapy in musculoskeletal disorders. This study indicates you need to consider how CDSS influences the decision-making authority of both physiotherapists and patients in the clinical encounter, ensuring technology empowers rather than replaces clinical judgment.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（11 名患者和 10 名物理治疗师），且仅在挪威进行，其发现的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (11 patients and 10 physiotherapists) and was conducted only in Norway, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: NeuroRehabilitation. PurposeIndividuals with stroke have difficulty rotating their trunk and adjusting their supporting foot when negotiating spatial constraints. This study aimed to classify movement
items.curatedReason: 中风患者在通过狭窄通道时存在特定的运动模式，例如躯干旋转受限和支撑足调整困难。这提示你在设计康复方案时，应特别关注这些精细的空间协调和步态调整训练，以改善患者的通行能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke patients exhibit specific movement patterns when navigating narrow openings, such as limited trunk rotation and difficulty adjusting the supporting foot. This suggests that when designing rehabilitation programs, you should specifically focus on training fine spatial coordination and gait adjustments to improve patients' ambulation capabilities.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（23 名中风患者），且为横断面设计，无法揭示运动模式随时间的变化或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (23 stroke patients) and a cross-sectional design, preventing it from revealing changes in movement patterns over time or the effects of interventions.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: Disability and rehabilitation. This scoping review aimed to identify and map the behavior change theories, behavior change techniques (BCTs), and effectiveness of self-management (SM) interventions de
items.curatedReason: 对于神经系统疾病患者，自我管理干预的有效性正在获得更多证据支持。你可以参考这篇综述，了解目前行为改变理论和技术在提高患者功能结局方面的应用，并在临床实践中考虑纳入结构化的自我管理策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Evidence for the effectiveness of self-management interventions in neurological disorders is growing. You can refer to this review to understand the application of current behavior change theories and techniques in improving patient functional outcomes, and consider incorporating structured self-management strategies in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 综述纳入的原始研究数量不多（18 项），且侧重于描述而非量化效果，证据强度仍需更高质量的 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: The review included a limited number of original studies (18) and focused on descriptive rather than quantitative effects, so the strength of evidence still requires validation from higher-quality RCTs.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: Physiotherapy theory and practice. Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease (PwP) has shown good feasibility, adherence, and health benefits. However, the rapid shift to online format
items.curatedReason: 在线团体运动对于帕金森病患者的可行性和益处已得到验证。这份定性研究为远程康复实践提供了宝贵经验，你在设计和实施在线课程时，应关注质量、内容和可及性，借鉴同行经验提升服务水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise has proven feasible and beneficial for people with Parkinson's disease. This qualitative study offers valuable insights for telerehabilitation practice; when designing and implementing online programs, you should focus on quality, content, and accessibility, drawing on peer experiences to enhance service delivery.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（10 名专业人员），且受访者经验可能存在偏倚，其发现的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (10 professionals), and the experiences of interviewees may be biased, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 33 chronic stroke patients found that Kinesio taping plus treadmill training, Mulligan taping plus treadmill training, and treadmill training alone all improved ankle dorsiflexion, balance, ankle stability, and fall efficacy over six weeks, with significant group differences observed in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion and static balance.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性中风患者的踝关节功能和平衡训练中，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑台训练均能带来益处。你可以将这些贴扎技术作为辅助手段，整合到针对中风患者的平衡和踝关节功能康复方案中。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性中风患者平衡和踝关节生物力学效应的比较：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 33 例慢性中风患者的随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎联合跑台训练、Mulligan 贴扎联合跑台训练以及单独跑台训练，在六周内均能改善踝关节背屈被动活动度、平衡、踝关节稳定性和跌倒效能，其中踝关节背屈被动活动度和静态平衡观察到显著组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Both Kinesio taping and Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training can benefit ankle function and balance in chronic stroke patients. You can integrate these taping techniques as adjuncts into balance and ankle function rehabilitation programs for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量小（每组 n=11），且只评估了短期干预效果，对长期疗效的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (n=11 per group) and only evaluated short-term intervention effects, limiting generalizability to long-term efficacy.

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: This correspondence highlights the need to invest in people rather than solely devices for rehabilitation, as WHO's global rehabilitation indicators shift focus from disease to functioning and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这封评论文章强调，全球康复发展需要投资于人，而不仅仅是设备。这提醒你，康复服务的核心是物理治疗师的专业技能和人员培养，而非盲目追求技术和器械。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 这封评论强调，随着世界卫生组织全球康复指标将重点从疾病转向功能和生活质量，康复需要投资于人，而非仅仅设备。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary emphasizes that global rehabilitation development requires investment in people, not just devices. This reminds you that the core of rehabilitation services lies in the professional skills and training of physical therapists, not merely the pursuit of technology and equipment.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study found high relative reliability (ICC values from 0.81 to 0.96) for digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment in 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中的高可靠性，支持其作为临床评估工具。在临床实践中，它能用于追踪疼痛敏感性变化，指导干预。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪测量终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈的可靠性研究：一项单中心可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，数字测痛仪在60名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压力痛阈评估中显示出较高的相对可靠性（ICC值为0.81至0.96）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The high reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients supports its use as a clinical assessment tool. In practice, you can use it to track changes in pain sensitivity and guide interventions.
items.limitation: 研究对象为终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果对其他类型KOA或不同人群的适用性尚需验证。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so generalizability to other KOA types or populations needs further validation.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: This observational cohort study from two Norwegian trauma centers (N=317) examined the provision and timing of early rehabilitation services for severely injured trauma patients.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心对重伤患者的早期康复介入率较低，尤其是在专科康复医师评估方面。这提示了在急性创伤康复路径中，物理治疗师可以发挥更大作用来填补评估和早期介入的空白。
items.titleZh: 创伤患者的早期康复：来自两家挪威创伤中心的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项来自两家挪威创伤中心的观察性队列研究（N=317）调查了重伤创伤患者早期康复服务的提供情况和时机。
items.curatedReasonEn: The low rate of early rehabilitation intervention for severely injured trauma patients in Norwegian trauma centers, particularly regarding specialist physiatrist assessment, suggests that physical therapists can play a greater role in filling assessment and early intervention gaps within acute trauma rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，可能存在未测混杂因素，且数据来源于挪威，结果外推至其他医疗体系时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study, potentially subject to unmeasured confounders, and its data comes from Norway, so generalizability to other healthcare systems should be cautious.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, finding lower activity in the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出较低的腓肠肌肌电活动。这提示在重返运动评估中，除了关注股四头肌和臏腱，还要重视三头肌，将其纳入康复训练目标。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的肌电活动，发现ACL重建组的活动度较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Individuals after ACLR demonstrated lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls. This suggests that in return-to-sport assessments, in addition to focusing on the quadriceps and patellar tendon, you should also prioritize the triceps surae and include it in rehabilitation training goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为对照研究，但未随机分组，且主要结局为肌电活动，非功能性表现。
items.limitationEn: This is a controlled study but not randomized, and the primary outcome was EMG activity, not functional performance.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: This qualitative study analyzed free-text responses from 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort to explore factors determining their decision to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 对ACL损伤患者重返运动决策的定性分析表明，患者心态、努力和支持是关键驱动因素。在你的重返运动指导中，除了客观功能评估，别忘了跟患者深入沟通这些主观因素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究分析了NACOX队列中112名患者的自由文本回答，以探讨决定他们前交叉韧带损伤后重返运动的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Qualitative analysis of return-to-sport decisions in ACL injury patients highlights mindset, effort, and support as key drivers. In your return-to-sport guidance, beyond objective functional assessments, remember to engage with patients on these subjective factors.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，结果反映患者主观视角，不涉及干预效果的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, reflecting patients' subjective perspectives, and does not involve quantitative evaluation of intervention effects.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey study described factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: BFRT在儿童和青少年ACL损伤患者中的临床应用仍缺乏一致性。如果你考虑在青少年患者中使用BFRT，应谨慎并与最新研究保持同步，避免过度依赖经验。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查研究描述了影响物理治疗师对前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The clinical application of BFRT in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients still lacks consistency. If you are considering using BFRT in adolescent patients, proceed cautiously and stay updated with the latest research to avoid over-reliance on anecdotal experience.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from physical therapists, potentially subject to recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
